params.description:
On Mar 30, 1983, a plan was made by the American government to bring down the Soviet Union.

During the Cold War, America launched the "Star Wars" plan to establish an air-space weapons system to eliminate the growing nuclear threat of the Soviet Union. It also helped develop space industrialization and obtain rich resources from space. This plan turned out to be a hoax according to CIA's exposure, but the Soviet Union invested so much in this lie that it almost bankrupted the whole country. In  …
